query:
SELECT 'Conhecimentos' as tabela, categoria, COUNT(*) as total FROM conhecimentos GROUP BY categoria
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Config IA' as tabela, categoria, COUNT(*) as total FROM agente_ia_config WHERE ativo = 1 GROUP BY categoria
ORDER BY tabela, total DESC
command:
mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway04.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3Xc9RJjwPAzqyUN.e36368bedae0 --database 4imSnKhwnzycXmSWcGeMqe --execute SELECT 'Conhecimentos' as tabela, categoria, COUNT(*) as total FROM conhecimentos GROUP BY categoria
UNION ALL
SELECT 'Config IA' as tabela, categoria, COUNT(*) as total FROM agente_ia_config WHERE ativo = 1 GROUP BY categoria
ORDER BY tabela, total DESC
